title: Divide a Fraction by a Whole Number
description: Divide a fraction by a whole number by multiplying by the reciprocal of the whole number.
condition: Expression of the form a/b ÷ n, where n is a whole number.
label: Principle / Model

title: Divide a Whole Number by a Unit Fraction
description: Divide a whole number by a unit fraction by multiplying by its reciprocal.
label: Principle / Model

title: Divide by Whole Number Using Reciprocal
description: Rewrite division by a whole number as multiplication by its reciprocal.
condition: An expression of the form a/b ÷ n where n is a whole number.
label: Principle / Model

title: Divide Unit Fraction by Whole Number
description: Compute the result when a unit fraction is divided by a whole number by multiplying the denominator by the whole number.
condition: Expression of the form (1/n) ÷ k, where n and k are whole numbers greater than 0.
response: Rewrite as 1/(n×k) and simplify if needed.
label: Principle / Model
notes: Can be justified using the meaning of division as equal sharing or by multiplying by the reciprocal of k.

title: Division by Unit Fraction as Multiplication
description: Recognize that dividing a whole number by a unit fraction is equivalent to multiplying by the denominator of the unit fraction.
condition: Expression of the form a ÷ (1/n), where a is a whole number and n is a whole number greater than 0.
response: Rewrite as a × n and compute the product.
label: Principle / Model
notes: Based on the inverse relationship between division and multiplication.

title: Equal Sharing Interpreted as Division
description: Represent a situation in which a quantity is shared equally among a number of people as a division expression.
condition: A total quantity is shared equally among n people.
label: Rule / Plan

title: Express Quotient as Unit Fraction
description: Express the result of dividing a unit fraction by a whole number as a unit fraction with denominator equal to the product of the original denominator and the whole number.
label: Principle / Model
notes: Closely related to divide_unit_fraction_by_whole_number but focused on expressing the final unit fraction form.

title: Fraction of a Fraction as Multiplication
description: Represent taking a fraction of a fraction using multiplication of fractions.
condition: Situation describing a fraction of another fraction (e.g., one part of a partitioned unit fraction).
response: Write a multiplication expression multiplying the two fractions.
label: Principle / Model
notes: Used to connect area/partition models to symbolic multiplication.

title: Fraction of a Quantity as Multiplication
description: Interpret phrases like '1/3 of a quantity' as multiplication of the fraction and the quantity.
condition: A problem states a fraction of a given quantity (e.g., '1/3 of 3 1/4').
label: Rule / Plan

title: Interpret Area Model as Fraction Product
description: Recognize that overlapping shaded regions in a rectangle partitioned by fractions represent the product of those fractions.
condition: Area diagram partitioned into equal rows and columns with overlapping shaded region.
response: Express shaded area as (rows shaded/total rows) × (columns shaded/total columns).
label: Principle / Model
example: If $\frac{3}{4}$ of height and $\frac{7}{5}$ of width are shaded, area is $\frac{3}{4} \times \frac{7}{5}$.

title: Match Division Expression to Numerical Value
description: Determine the value of a division expression with whole numbers and unit fractions to match it to its numerical result.
condition: Division expressions involving whole numbers and unit fractions.
response: Compute or reason about relative size to match each expression to its value.
label: Principle / Model

title: Multiply Two Fractions
description: Find the product of two fractions by multiplying numerators and denominators.
condition: Expression of the form a/b × c/d.
label: Principle / Model

title: Recognize the Whole in Area Model
description: Identify that the entire large square or rectangle represents one whole unit.
condition: Area diagram labeled with 1 along full side length.
response: Treat entire figure as 1 square unit when computing fractional area.
label: Concept
example: The full square represents 1 liter, so shaded part is a fraction of 1.

title: Represent Fractional Side Lengths in Area Model
description: Interpret a shaded rectangle in a unit square grid as the product of two fractional side lengths.
condition: A unit square is partitioned into equal rows and columns with a shaded sub-rectangle.
response: Express the shaded area as (fraction of width) × (fraction of height).
label: Principle / Model
example: If 1 of 3 rows and 1 of 8 columns are shaded, area $= \frac{1}{3} \times \frac{1}{8}$.

title: Write Division Expression from Model
description: Translate a visual or contextual model of a unit fraction split into equal parts into a division expression.
condition: A diagram shows 1/n partitioned into k equal parts with one part highlighted.
label: Concept
example: If $\frac{1}{3}$ is split into 4 equal parts, write $\frac{1}{3} \div 4$.
notes: Response form is fixed as a division expression structure.
